overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character exploring the historic cobblestone streets of Saint Denis at night. The scene features gas lamp lighting, wet reflective streets, 19th-century architecture, and a passing tram car.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street corner with bakery

events.description: character turns right onto sidewalk next to brick wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street, passing the bakery and turning onto the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story brick building with red signage reading 'LE HAVRE BAKERY' and arched windows
tall historic stone building with multiple floors and balconies on the street corner
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow illuminating the wet street
wet reflective cobblestone street surface with puddles reflecting the lamplight

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet cobblestone street at night, passing the Le Havre Bakery on the left. Gas lamps cast a warm glow on the historic stone buildings. Around 6 seconds, the character turns right onto a sidewalk next to a brick wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with brick retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a tall brick wall, passing trees and street lamps

entered.detail: tall red brick wall running along the right side of the sidewalk with decorative stone caps
line of mature trees with white-painted trunks separating the sidewalk from the street
cylindrical metal garbage can on the sidewalk near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a tall brick wall on the right and a line of trees on the left. The historic buildings of the previous street recede behind as the character approaches a large intersection with an ornate hotel visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with tram tracks and grand hotel

events.description: electric tram car passes by on the right, moving along the tracks

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street and tram tracks, approaching the ornate hotel building

notable_agents.action: electric tram car moving from right to left across the intersection

entered.detail: large three-story historic building with wraparound balconies, ornate iron railings, and multiple lit windows
dark colored electric streetcar with lit windows moving along the tracks
metal tram rails embedded in the cobblestone street surface
horse-drawn carriage waiting in the distance near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, stepping over tram tracks as an electric tram passes by on the right. The grand hotel building dominates the view ahead with its ornate balconies and warm interior lighting. A horse-drawn buggy waits in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel veranda with iron railings and potted plants

agents.ego_description: walking along the front of the ornate hotel, observing the architectural details and veranda

entered.detail: black ornate wrought iron railing along the hotel's raised veranda
stone base wall with red brick infill supporting the hotel veranda
covered walkway with columns and hanging lanterns along the hotel front
large planters with greenery on the hotel veranda

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the front of the grand hotel, passing under the covered veranda with its ornate iron railings and stone pillars. The tram and street recede into the background as the character explores the detailed architecture of the building's facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the wet, gas-lit streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a narrow commercial lane to the grand facade of a luxury hotel. It begins with the character walking past the Le Havre Bakery, where warm lamplight reflects off the damp cobblestones, before turning right onto a sidewalk bordered by a tall brick wall and a line of trees. As the character advances, the narrow path opens into a wide intersection, shifting the focus toward a distant, ornate hotel as the character steps over tram tracks while an electric tram passes by. The scene then expands to reveal the full scale of the grand hotel, with its warm interior lighting and a waiting horse-drawn buggy in the background. Finally, the camera follows the character under the hotel's covered veranda, moving past ornate iron railings and stone pillars as the bustling street recedes behind the detailed architecture of the facade.
